linkedin.title: AI GTM Engineer | Clay, Smartlead, n8n | Outbound Systems
linkedin.headline: AI GTM Engineer | Full-stack outbound + RevOps | Omnibound + RemoteState | Clay · n8n · Python | 9 GTM repos
linkedin.about:
I build the full revenue motion: outbound infrastructure, lead scoring, CRM automation, pipeline attribution, and the Python, Clay, and n8n systems behind it.

Current: AI GTM Engineer at Omnibound AI (Founder's Office). Cut deploy 2 weeks to 3 days. Unified 6 data sources into one 0-100 lead score. 1.5%+ positive reply rates across 300+ mailboxes.

Previous: RemoteState Founder's Office - $180K ARR in 6 months, 250+ domains, scaled SDR team 1 to 4.

Portfolio + 9 open-source repos: rasulshaikh.github.io/gtm-portfolio

Stack: Clay, Smartlead, HubSpot, n8n, Claude Code, Python, Playwright, Supabase, SEMrush, Ahrefs.

Open to GTM Engineer, RevOps, Growth Engineer roles. Remote worldwide.

indeed.summary: AI GTM Engineer with 3+ years building outbound systems for B2B SaaS. Expert in Clay, Smartlead, n8n, and HubSpot. Generated $550K+ revenue and $3.5M+ pipeline. Built 9 production GTM tools on GitHub. 250+ domain deliverability at 95%+. Available remote immediately.

I ship signal-to-pipeline systems: Clay tables, n8n orchestration, Smartlead/HeyReach sends, and gates so bad lists never go out. $550K+ revenue, $3.5M+ pipeline, 9 GitHub repos, live portfolio with case studies. Looking for GTM Engineer or technical growth roles at B2B startups.
